title: SharedTrades
description: SharedTrades synchronizes villager trades and cured zombie villager discounts across all players on a server, making trading consistent and fair.
body:
**SharedTrades** is a Minecraft Paper plugin that synchronizes villager trades and discounts across all players on the server. ### Key Features * Sync villager trades so every player sees the same offers * Share cured zombie villager discounts with all players * Fully server-side, no client mods required * Lightweight and server-friendly * Works automatically with no commands or configuration needed ### Functionality In vanilla Minecraft, villagers maintain separate trades for each player, and cured zombie villager discounts apply only to the player who cured them. **SharedTrades** unifies villager trades and discounts, making it easier for groups and communities to trade consistently. Now, when one player unlocks a discount or new trade, everyone benefits automatically—no setup required. ### Installation SharedTrades is a server-side plugin. Simply drop it in your `plugins` folder and reload your server. No client installation is necessary. ### Disclaimer Due to the way Minecraft internally handles villager trade caching and player-specific prices, some discounts may occasionally appear different for different players. This is a limitation of vanilla Minecraft and not a bug in SharedTrades.

🛠 Support & Bug Reports

Found a bug or need help setting up the plugin?
Report issues directly on Discord.
